title: SEIU Local 509 Units 8 and 10 — mass.gov capture
description: Capture of the Massachusetts Human Resources Division (HRD) page for SEIU Local 509 Units 8 and 10, the bargaining units covering Commonwealth human-service workers and educators (DDS members fall under Unit 8 or Unit 10). The captured page is brief — it identifies the SEIU 509 Training and Professional Development Fund and links to its site; it contains no contract text, unit-scope language, or membership figures. Prose page converted to Markdown.
notes: Page capture includes mass.gov chrome that is not substantive content. The page body is a short stub (training-fund description + external link). For full contract terms see data/contract/seiu-509-cba-2024-2026.md.
